mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.student_no studentNo, s.name studentName, g.course_no courseNo, c.course_name courseName, g.score, g.gpa, g.term, g.exam_date examDate FROM grade g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_no = s.student_no LEFT JOIN course c ON g.course_no = c.course_no
( g.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR g.course_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR c.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR g.term LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') )
ORDER BY g.exam_date DESC, g.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(g.id) FROM grade g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_no = s.student_no LEFT JOIN course c ON g.course_no = c.course_no
( g.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR g.course_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR c.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') OR g.term LIKE CONCAT('%',#{q},'%') )

SELECT g.id, g.student_no studentNo, s.name studentName, g.course_no courseNo, c.course_name courseName, g.score, g.gpa, g.term, g.exam_date examDate FROM grade g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_no = s.student_no LEFT JOIN course c ON g.course_no = c.course_no WHERE g.id = #{id}
